summary: Comprehensive testing of Player Evaluation PDF Export and English Interface for SoccerMatch. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified to be in English, mobile responsive layout working correctly.

issues: AI-generated report content (Executive Summary, Strengths Analysis) is in French - this is historical data from previous evaluations, not a UI issue

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login works for analyst credentials
Backend: GET /api/analyst/evaluations returns analyst's evaluations
Backend: GET /api/evaluation/{id}/export-pdf requires authentication (401/403 without token)
Backend: GET /api/evaluation/{id}/export-pdf returns valid PDF with correct headers
Backend: GET /api/evaluation/{id}/export-pdf returns 404 for non-existent evaluation
Backend: GET /api/evaluation/players returns 21 players
Backend: GET /api/player/{id}/dashboard returns player dashboard data
Backend: GET /api/player/{id}/dashboard returns 404 for non-existent player
Backend: GET /api/evaluation/archetypes returns English archetype labels
Backend: GET /api/evaluation/metrics returns English metric labels
Backend: GET /api/evaluation/{id} returns English strengths/weaknesses labels
Frontend: Analyst dashboard displays in English (EVALUATIONS, PLAYERS EVALUATED, RECOMMENDED)
Frontend: Evaluation view displays in English (Evaluation Report, Export PDF, Category Scores)
Frontend: Radar Chart labels are in English (Technical, Tactical, Physical, Mental, Attacking, Defending)
Frontend: Player Silhouette labels are in English (Head, Torso, Arms, Legs)
Frontend: Top Strengths and Development Areas display English metric names
Frontend: Players list page displays in English (Players to Evaluate, Evaluate buttons)
Frontend: Evaluation form tabs are in English (Match, Technical, Tactical, Physical, Mental, Profile, Videos, Summary)
Frontend: Export PDF button is visible and enabled
Frontend: Mobile responsive layout works correctly (390x844 viewport)
Frontend: Tablet responsive layout works correctly (768x1024 viewport)
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: Recharts radar chart shows width/height -1 warning - may need minWidth/minHeight props for ResponsiveContainer

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI flows working, English labels verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Player Evaluation PDF Export and English Interface fully tested. PDF export uses ReportLab library and returns valid PDF files with proper headers. All UI labels in Analyst dashboard, Evaluation view, Radar Chart, Player Silhouette, and Evaluation form are in English. Mobile responsive layout verified for iPhone (390x844) and tablet (768x1024) viewports. The only French text remaining is in AI-generated report content from historical evaluations - this is expected as it's user-generated content, not UI labels.

verified_features.details: GET /api/evaluation/{id}/export-pdf returns valid PDF with application/pdf content type and attachment disposition
GET /api/player/{id}/dashboard returns player info, evaluations, evolution data, aggregate scores
EVALUATIONS, PLAYERS EVALUATED, RECOMMENDED, Recent Evaluations, Strongly Recommend, Recommend
Evaluation Report, Export PDF, Match Information, Category Scores, Radar Profile, Strength Zones, Top Strengths, Development Areas
Technical, Tactical, Physical, Mental, Attacking, Defending
Head, Torso, Arms, Legs, Low, High
Match, Technical, Tactical, Physical, Mental, Profile, Videos, Summary tabs
Dashboard and Evaluation view adapt correctly to mobile (390x844) and tablet (768x1024) viewports
